ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "lender_id" TEXT /* ID of the lender granting the loan */,
  "borrower_id" TEXT /* ID of the borrower receiving the loan */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan granted */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., active, repaid) */,
  "loan_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the loan as stated by the borrower */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan is due */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan category */,
  "repayment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of repayments (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "loan_term" TEXT /* Duration of the loan */,
  "guarantor_id" TEXT /* ID of the guarantor, if applicable */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the loan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was approved */,
  "disbursed_amount" REAL /* Actual amount disbursed */,
  "disbursed_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES loan_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "inviter_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who sent the invitation */,
  "invitee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the invitee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., sent, accepted) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the invitation was sent */,
  "accepted_date" TEXT /* Date when the invitation was accepted */,
  "invitee_name" TEXT /* Name of the invitee */,
  "invitee_role" TEXT /* Role of the invitee (lender, borrower, etc.) */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for marketing purposes */,
  "invitation_message" TEXT /* Personalized message from the inviter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment schedule */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the repayment */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the repayment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the repayment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repayment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "repayment_method" TEXT /* Method of repayment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "repayment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the repayment */,
  "repayment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the repayment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_repayments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan to which the interest rate applies */,
  "rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method of calculating the interest (e.g., simple, compound) */,
  "interest_start_date" TEXT /* Date when interest starts accruing */,
  "interest_end_date" TEXT /* Date when interest stops accruing */,
  "interest_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of interest calculation (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_interests_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The feedback text provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., technical, service, security) */,
  "feedback_rating" REAL /* Numeric rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan category (e.g., education, business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan category */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image for the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., loan request, invitation) */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
